role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific plant species (Picea abies, Betula pendula) and their ranges.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road signs (Vienna Convention) and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural styles and regional aesthetics.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Norway. The agents provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence, particularly regarding the regulatory sign and architectural style. The tournament correctly used the sign match to distinguish Norway from Sweden.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of hilly terrain and coniferous forests match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of spruce and birch match the visible vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: The blue square sign is correctly identified and described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of wooden siding and fencing match the image.
